name: Combined: Slowloris Analysis (Testing + Iran 2009 + Archive 2024)
description: Combined view of Slowloris attacks across three scenarios: Laboratory testing, Iran 2009 protests, and Internet Archive 2024

techniques.comment:
[Testing Scenario - Slowloris Attack] Attack leverages legitimate HTTP protocol interactions via port 80

[Iran 2009 - Slowloris Against Government Sites] HTTP protocol used to maintain stealth and preserve bandwidth for protester communications

[Internet Archive 2024 - Modern Slow DoS Variant] Sophisticated use of HTTP/HTTPS protocols with modern evasion techniques

[Testing Scenario - Slowloris Attack] Network Denial of Service - Results in complete service unavailability (HTTP 000, connection timeouts)

[Iran 2009 - Slowloris Against Government Sites] Strategic denial of service - Disrupted state communications while preserving protester bandwidth

[Internet Archive 2024 - Modern Slow DoS Variant] Critical infrastructure denial - Major digital library unavailable for extended period

[Testing Scenario - Slowloris Attack] Service Exhaustion Flood - Slowloris exhausts Apache MaxRequestWorkers by maintaining 500 partial HTTP connections

[Iran 2009 - Slowloris Against Government Sites] Service Exhaustion - Multiple government websites rendered unavailable during civil unrest

[Internet Archive 2024 - Modern Slow DoS Variant] Service Exhaustion at massive scale - Extended Internet Archive offline period

[Testing Scenario - Slowloris Attack] Application Exhaustion Flood - Targets Apache's thread-based connection handling logic with partial HTTP headers

[Iran 2009 - Slowloris Against Government Sites] Application-layer attack targeting government web server connection pools

[Internet Archive 2024 - Modern Slow DoS Variant] Advanced application-layer exhaustion targeting modern web architectures

[Testing Scenario - Slowloris Attack] Adversary acquires Slowloris tool (Python-based script) from public repositories

[Iran 2009 - Slowloris Against Government Sites] Protesters acquired and distributed Slowloris tool for coordinated campaign

[Internet Archive 2024 - Modern Slow DoS Variant] Modern slow DoS variants and evolved Slowloris techniques acquired

[Testing Scenario - Slowloris Attack] Attacker identifies Apache/2.4 web server and version through banner grabbing

[Iran 2009 - Slowloris Against Government Sites] Activists identified Iranian government websites as targets (gerdab.ir, leader.ir)

[Internet Archive 2024 - Modern Slow DoS Variant] Advanced reconnaissance of Internet Archive infrastructure and content delivery systems

[Testing Scenario - Slowloris Attack] Vulnerability scanning to confirm Apache is susceptible to Slowloris (thread-based MPM prefork configuration)

[Internet Archive 2024 - Modern Slow DoS Variant] Detailed vulnerability scanning to identify weaknesses in large-scale infrastructure
[Internet Archive 2024 - Modern Slow DoS Variant] Likely used proxy infrastructure to obscure attack sources
[Internet Archive 2024 - Modern Slow DoS Variant] Data availability destruction - Cultural heritage and historical records inaccessible
[Internet Archive 2024 - Modern Slow DoS Variant] Potential defacement or manipulation during extended outage window
[Internet Archive 2024 - Modern Slow DoS Variant] Established botnet infrastructure for massive distributed attack
[Iran 2009 - Slowloris Against Government Sites] Manipulation of information flow - Silenced government propaganda during political crisis
[Iran 2009 - Slowloris Against Government Sites] Used distributed infrastructure (multiple protester machines) to avoid network saturation
